# Crito

*[Plato](../philosophers/plato.md) · 399 BCE · *Κρίτων**

A dialogue in which Socrates, in prison, refuses to escape: through the personified voice of the Laws of Athens, he argues that one must never commit injustice, not even against the city that has unjustly condemned him.
